creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 174482
update thunderbird to 45.3.0

>-BUILD_DEPENDS=	nspr>=4.12:devel/nspr \
>+BUILD_DEPENDS=	ar:devel/binutils \
>+		nspr>=4.12:devel/nspr \

Why do you need binutils? thunderbird-45.3.0 builds fine without this change on 10.1 i386 (clang 3.4.1).
